scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w app/web" "npm run start:dev -w app/api"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w app/web && npm run lint -w app/api
scripts.build:desktop: npm run prisma:generate -w app/api && npm run build -w app/api && npm run build:desktop -w app/web && npm run prisma:generate:desktop -w app/api && npm run prepare-resources -w app/desktop && npm run rebuild-native -w app/desktop && npm run build -w app/desktop && npm run pack -w app/desktop && npm run prisma:restore:web -w app/api
